tasks.subject: Task 1: ctx-carried IP/UA seam + audit vocabulary + middleware
tasks.description:
Foundation: audit.WithRequestMeta + ctx-aware dbWriter.Record fill (explicit wins), requestMetaMW mounted before LoadSession, new consts FactorSettings/EventSudoGranted/EventSudoFailed. Files: pkg/audit/reqmeta.go(+test), pkg/audit/event.go, pkg/server/middleware_reqmeta.go, pkg/server/server.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/audit/reqmeta.go", "pkg/audit/reqmeta_test.go", "pkg/audit/event.go", "pkg/server/middleware_reqmeta.go", "pkg/server/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/audit/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WithRequestMeta + ctx-aware Record fill (explicit wins)", "requestMetaMW before LoadSession", "FactorSettings/EventSudoGranted/EventSudoFailed", "unit tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: propagate new factor/event values to audit-viewer filters
tasks.description:
Add settings/sudo/session/enrollment_consumed/clone_warning to dashboard/src/lib/audit.ts AUDIT_FACTORS/AUDIT_EVENTS; confirm no server-side allowlist in handle_admin_audit.go.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/lib/audit.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npx vue-tsc -b", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AUDIT_FACTORS has settings", "AUDIT_EVENTS has sudo_granted/sudo_failed/session_start/session_end/enrollment_consumed/clone_warning", "no server allowlist blocks them", "vitest+vue-tsc green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: forward-auth/PAT gateway — audit failures & denials
tasks.description:
forward_auth.go: personal_access_token|fail on bad/disabled/not-granted PAT; oidc_client|access_denied on RBAC deny (PAT + cookie paths); oidc_client|fail on callback failures. No success emission.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/forward_auth_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/ -run ForwardAuth", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PAT fail records", "RBAC access_denied PAT+cookie", "callback fail records", "no success emission", "test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: WebAuthn login — use/fail/clone_warning records
tasks.description:
handle_auth.go: webauthn|use on login success; webauthn|fail on each failure branch; webauthn|clone_warning on sign-count regression. (session_start/end for this file = Task 8.)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_auth.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Login|Auth'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["webauthn|use success", "webauthn|fail all branches", "webauthn|clone_warning", "builds+tests"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: OIDC token/refresh/revoke — failure audits + attribution
tasks.description:
token.go/refresh.go/revoke.go/logout.go: oidc_client|fail on token-endpoint rejections; refresh fail + refresh_reuse AccountID (from rotateRefresh); revoke AccountID; logout EventUse→EventSessionEnd.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/oidc/token.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/refresh.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/revoke.go", "pkg/protocol/oidc/logout.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["token fail records", "refresh fail + reuse AccountID", "revoke AccountID", "logout session_end", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SAML — replay & signature failure audits
tasks.description:
sso.go/slo.go: saml_sp|fail on replayed AuthnRequest + signature/parse failures when SP is resolved. AccountID may be nil.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go", "pkg/protocol/saml/slo.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["replay fail record", "signature-fail-on-known-SP records", "no record when SP unresolved", "tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: sudo — grant reshape + fail + clone_warning
tasks.description:
handle_sudo.go: grant = verified factor + EventSudoGranted + {method}; EventSudoFailed on fail paths; webauthn|clone_warning on sudo clone.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_sudo.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./pkg/server/ -run Sudo", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grant verified-factor + EventSudoGranted", "EventSudoFailed on fails", "clone_warning", "test passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: session lifecycle — session_start / session_end
tasks.description:
session|session_start in handle_auth.go/handle_auth_password.go/handle_auth_recovery.go after Issue; session|session_end on handle_auth.go logout + handle_forward_auth_signout.go. (enrollment/pairing/confirm session_start = Task 11.)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pkg/server/handle_auth.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth_password.go", "pkg/server/handle_auth_recovery.go", "pkg/server/handle_forward_auth_signout.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./pkg/server/ -run 'Login|Logout|Recovery'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["session_start at 3 login handlers", "session_end at logout+signout", "builds+tests"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 14: smoke coverage + full gate + dist
tasks.description:
Extend smoke verify*AuditEvents + assertAuditDetailNoSecret for new events (login use/fail, session_start/end, gateway fail/deny, sudo grant/fail, settings factor, consent access_revoked); full gate; rebuild+commit dist.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/smoke/main.go", "pkg/webui/dist"], "verifyCommand": "go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... && (cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npx vue-tsc -b && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke asserts new events", "assertAuditDetailNoSecret extended", "full gate green", "live smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0", "dist rebuilt+committed"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
